blog_title: Boxy Fit T-Shirt Always Out of Stock — Manufacturing Reason Why 500 Pcs Need 15-20 Days in India
caption:
Your supplier says 15-20 days for 500 boxy tees. You think they're slow. They're actually being honest. 😬

Here's the math: Regular fit wastes 8-10% fabric. Boxy fit? 18-20%. Same roll makes 100 regular pieces but only 80 boxy ones. Cost jumps ₹15-20 per piece. Plus, every brand wants different measurements—no standard exists.

Boxy is always made-to-order. Always.

Save this post before your next bulk order 👇
